query:
UPDATE games SET publishedModel = 1, publishedToFeed = 1 WHERE id IN (2490001, 2460001);
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, publishedModel, publishedToFeed, modelTotal, awayModelSpread FROM games WHERE id IN (2490001, 2460001);
